title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 470.160 - Appeals taken
text:
470.160.  Appeals taken. — Any party who shall have appeared to any proceedings, and the prosecuting attorney on behalf of the state, shall have the right to prosecute an appeal upon any such judgment.
(RSMo 1939 § 635, A. 1949 S.B. 1137) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 635; 1919 § 5324; 1909 § 6271
